reviews.comment:
Es nuestro auxilio esteemos donde esteemos y lo Nesecitas hay estan ellos no te dejan tirado,llamas y hay estan.

(Translated by Google)
They are our help wherever we are and if you need them, they are there, they don't leave you stranded, you call and they are there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzM3U2RXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es poco entendible que haya que hacer una cola a veces de más de una cuadra para cargar combustible durante todo el año,  ni que decir de la época estival. Dársena de carga con capacidad para seis vehículos y tamaña espera? La atención del personal de playa, en su mayoría, excelente.

(Translated by Google)
It's hard to understand why there's a line sometimes stretching for more than a block to fill up with fuel year-round, let alone during the summer. A loading bay with capacity for six vehicles and such a long wait? The service from the beach staff, for the most part, was excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcHVqTGhBRRAB
